spawnPools.name: Legacy Laser Hostiles
spawnPools.description: Legacy Blood Raiders-only hostile pool retained for older configs and targeted laser-only testing.

spawnPools.name: Mining Operations
spawnPools.description: Weighted diamond-style mining pool spanning Ventures, barges, and exhumers for manual mining-fleet spawning.

spawnPools.name: Mining Hauler T1
spawnPools.description: Weighted T1 industrial hauler pool for empire mining fleets.

spawnPools.name: Mining Hauler T2
spawnPools.description: Weighted T2 industrial hauler pool for lower-security mining fleets.

spawnPools.name: Mining Hauler Highsec
spawnPools.description: High-security mining-hauler pool biased toward T1 industrials, matching public player reports.

spawnPools.name: Mining Hauler Lowsec
spawnPools.description: Low-security mining-hauler pool with a stronger T2 industrial presence.

spawnPools.name: Mining Hauler Nullsec
spawnPools.description: Null-security mining-hauler pool biased toward tougher T2 industrials.

spawnPools.name: Legacy Blood Raiders
